subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter, wherein was mentioned the matter of Siráj al-Mulk and the Farrásh-Báshí, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که قضیه سراج الملک و فراش باشی در آن مذکور بود رسید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @wisdom [hikmat]
